steps.subject: missed calls while you're on a job
steps.body:
Hey — when you're on a job, you can't answer every call. But whoever just called {{business}} probably called the next company on Google right after.

We built a system that texts missed callers within 60 seconds, qualifies them, and sends a booking link — automatically. You finish the job you're on. The next one's already on your calendar.

Worth a quick 15 minutes? trymetric.co

steps.subject: 30-40% of your calls go unanswered
steps.body:
That's the average for owner-operated businesses like yours. Most of those callers don't leave a voicemail — they move on to the next result on Google.

I built a quick calculator if you want to see what that's actually costing {{business}} each month: trymetric.co/#calculator — takes 30 seconds.

We fix this automatically. Text-back within 60 seconds, qualify them, send a booking link. Founding rate is $97/mo — only 3 spots.

trymetric.co

steps.subject: what happens when someone calls and you don't pick up
steps.body:
A homeowner in {{city}} calls {{business}}. You're mid-job. They hang up.

60 seconds later, they get a text from your number: "Hey — sorry we missed you. What's going on?" They reply. It's an urgent job. A booking link goes straight to their phone.

You're still on the job. They're already on your calendar.

That's the whole system. Worth a look? trymetric.co

steps.subject: closing the loop
steps.body:
I know you're busy running jobs in {{city}}.

If missed calls ever become a real problem for {{business}}, we're easy to reach: calendly.com/metriccall

Good luck out there.
